title: replace OnceLock<Vec<String>> with static str slice in chat_using
description: chat_using() in mod.rs uses OnceLock<Vec<String>> to lazily initialize two compile-time constant URN strings. The runtime allocation and synchronization overhead is unnecessary — the values are known at compile time. Replace with: static CHAT_USING: &[&str] = &["urn:ietf:params:jmap:core", "urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat"]; and update build_request to accept &[&str]. This eliminates the OnceLock, the heap allocation of Vec<String>, and the false impression that initialization is expensive.
